"rationale": {
  "R1.1": "Identifies key conceptual issues and proposes a reframing that addresses them effectively.",
  "R1.2": "Walks through the argument chain, flags multiple inconsistencies, and offers detailed fixes.",
  "R1.4": "Names prior work but doesn't map against multiple works, so partial delta articulation.",
  "R1.6": "Provides thorough revisions with consistent improvements across the text.",
  "RX.1": "Clearly marks uncertainties and requests missing information for accurate scoring.",
  "RX.3": "Stays within scope, addressing all critical issues without deviation.",
  "RX.4": "Identifies harmful patterns in original content without introducing new errors.",
  "RX.5": "Traces major rewrites but lacks annotation for minor edits."
},

}

rationale.R1.1: Identifies key conceptual issues and proposes a reframing that addresses them effectively.
rationale.R1.2: Walks through the argument chain, flags multiple inconsistencies, and offers detailed fixes.
rationale.R1.4: Names prior work but doesn't map against multiple works, so partial delta articulation.
rationale.R1.6: Provides thorough revisions with consistent improvements across the text.
rationale.RX.1: Clearly marks uncertainties and requests missing information for accurate scoring.
rationale.RX.3: Stays within scope, addressing all critical issues without deviation.
rationale.RX.4: Identifies harmful patterns in original content without introducing new errors.
rationale.RX.5: Traces major rewrites but lacks annotation for minor edits.
